goal_text: Task 10515: You want to find a moderately priced restaurant and it should be in the north part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. You want to know the address and phone number of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
